skills.name: Rallying Cry
skills.desc: Inspires all allies, boosting strength and crit. Gains a protective shield. Lead by example!

skills.name: Heroic Challenge
skills.desc: Taunts all enemies, gains massive shield and regeneration. Unyielding defense!

skills.name: Unyielding Spirit
skills.desc: Below 30% HP, gain damage reduction and regeneration. Fight to the last!

skills.name: Counter-Offensive
skills.desc: When hit, retaliate with damage and slow the attacker. Punish aggression!

skills.name: Battle-Hardened
skills.desc: Increased Strength, Health, and Damage Reduction. A true survivor.

skills.name: Arcane Overcharge
skills.desc: Empowers self, damages and debuffs all enemies. Unleash technological fury!

skills.name: Kinetic Pulse
skills.desc: Blasts an enemy, stunning and dispelling their buffs. Precision engineering.

skills.name: Modular Enhancements
skills.desc: After taking damage, gain a temporary stat boost. Adapt and overcome.

skills.name: Emergency Field
skills.desc: Upon an ally's death, shield another ally. Protecting the vulnerable.

skills.name: Precision Engineering
skills.desc: Increased Intelligence, Critical Chance, and Armor Penetration. Calculated strikes.

skills.name: Inspire Morale
skills.desc: Rallies all allies, boosting strength, crit, and cleansing debuffs. For the frontlines!

skills.name: Coordinated Assault
skills.desc: Strikes an enemy column, damaging and weakening their defenses. Strategic precision.

skills.name: Strategic Insight
skills.desc: Upon killing an enemy, gain mana and temporary stat boost. Adapt and conquer.

skills.name: Shield Wall
skills.desc: When an ally is at low HP, grant them a protective shield. No ally left behind.

skills.name: Frontline Commander
skills.desc: Increased Health, Damage Reduction, and all stats. Unyielding leadership.

skills.name: Harmonious Hymn

skills.name: Cacophony
skills.desc: Unleashes a discordant tune, damaging all enemies, silencing and blinding them.

skills.name: Swift Movement
skills.desc: When dodging an attack, restore mana and gain temporary evasion. Nimble defender.

skills.name: Sustaining Melody
skills.desc: When an ally reaches low HP, heal them and restore Troubadour's mana. Keep the song going.

skills.name: Enchanting Aura
skills.desc: Increased Agility and Dodge Chance. Enemies attacking have a chance to be blinded.

skills.name: Imbued Weapon
skills.desc: Empowers self, gaining Strength, Intelligence, and Critical Chance. Arcane might!

skills.name: Rune Explosion
skills.desc: Unleashes elemental energy, damaging all enemies and applying Burn and Freeze.

skills.name: Elemental Aegis
skills.desc: When hit, gain a temporary damage shield and counter with elemental damage.

skills.name: Arcane Overload
skills.desc: Upon killing an enemy, restore mana and gain temporary Intelligence. Power surge!

skills.name: Master Runecrafter
skills.desc: Increased Intelligence, Magic Resist, and Armor Penetration. Elemental mastery.

skills.name: Divine Intervention

skills.name: Sacred Sanctuary

skills.name: Unwavering Resolve

skills.name: Holy Rebuke

skills.name: Cleansing Light

skills.name: Abyssal Pact

skills.name: Demonic Resilience

skills.name: Ritual of Power
skills.desc: Upon killing an enemy, restore mana and gain temporary Intelligence and Strength. Dark ascension.

skills.name: Master of the Void
skills.desc: Increased Intelligence, Health, and Magic Resist. Commands dark energies.
